title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-28
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the metrics
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics across the app greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statuses in the apps directory.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory and greenhouse metrics remain accurate and up-to-date for developers.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a clipboard and checking on pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse. A chunky robot companion helps record the data on a glowing lime green screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a clipboard while checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, displaying lime green (#ecf874) charts on its screen. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a clipboard while checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, displaying lime green (#ecf874) charts on its screen. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
